text_block_list.text:
Time flies after Biwa Hayahide's debut, and
before we know it, the Asahi Hai F.S. has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My uniform is impeccable, and I just checked my
cleats earlier...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I can't help that I am.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is a G1 race. It's my first time running in such
a large competition.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I want to make sure everything is perfect to make
the most of this opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'd best get out there.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Aaand next up in the paddock is Biwa Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Even the crowd is louder at a G1, and I'm pretty
sure I spot a few live broadcast cameras set up.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: A lot of eyes will be on this race. I wonder if she's watching too...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter. Either way, I don't intend to
lose.
